series_metadata.series_description: Documents of various types (vouchers, refunds, debit and credit card documentation) relating to and supporting vouchers, overpayments and underpayments to customers.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: all records from end of fiscal period which they pertain. ; Microform: all records from end of fiscal period which they pertain. Effective July 2006, these records are no longer being microfilmed. Eventually all lmicrofilmed records will be destroyed. ; Electronic: all records from end of fiscal period which they pertain
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
